cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Thomas could have gone to the football field. First, the problem says that Thomas went to the football field today, and we need to find out between what times he could have done that. The football field is closed after 9pm, so whatever time he went, it has to be before 9pm. Now, let's look at the list of events when Thomas was seen doing other things. Each of these events has a specific time frame. I need to check if there are any gaps in these time frames where Thomas wasn't doing something else, and those gaps would be the possible times he could have gone to the football field. So, let's list out the events in chronological order with their times: 1. Thomas woke up at 8am. 2. David saw Thomas fixing their computer at the electronic store from 8am to 10am. 3. Jennifer saw Thomas buying lunch at the deli from 10am to 12pm. 4. Lisa saw Thomas walking towards the Statue of Liberty from 12pm to 2pm. 5. Sarah saw Thomas buying a phone at the electronics store from 2pm to 5pm. 6. Kimberly saw Thomas buying a bike at the bike shop from 6pm to 9pm. Now let's see the timeline: - From 8am to 10am: fixing computer at electronic store. - Then from 10am to 12pm: buying lunch at deli. - Then from 12pm to 2pm: walking towards Statue of Liberty. - Then from 2pm to 5pm: buying phone at electronics store. - Then from 6pm to 9pm: buying bike at bike shop. So let's check for gaps between these events where Thomas wasn't seen doing anything. The key is that he can only go to the football field during a time when he wasn't doing something else. First, from 8am to 10am, he's at the electronic store. So he can't go to the football field during that time. From 10am to 12pm, he's at the deli buying lunch. So again, he can't go to the football field during that time. From 12pm to 2pm, he's walking towards the Statue of Liberty. So he can't go to the football field during that time either. From 2pm to 5pm, he's at the electronics store buying a phone. So again, no time to go to the football field. From 5pm to 6pm, there's a gap. We don't have any information about what Thomas was doing between 5pm and 6pm. He finished buying the phone at 5pm and then went to the bike shop at 6pm. So between 5pm and 6pm, there's no alibi for Thomas. This could be a possible time for him to go to the football field. From 6pm to 9pm, he's at the bike shop. So he can't go to the football field during that time either. And after 9pm, the football field is closed, so that's also not an option. So the only gap in Thomas's schedule is between 5pm and 6pm.
